commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a contents-write GitHub Actions workflow and script support to translate native Android/Apple inventory artifacts for the full 20-locale matrix using the existing Control UI i18n client.

PR surface: Config +119, Other +149. Total +268 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/workflow PR rather than a bug report. Source and live PR inspection show the native refresh path exists only on the PR stack, not current main.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This protected maintainer draft needs stack-order, workflow-permission, and final proof review rather than a narrow automated repair.

target.title: feat(i18n): refresh all native locale artifacts
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Native app locale work needs the same provider-backed translation process as Control UI instead of a separate manual path or a Hindi/Russian-only workflow.

## Why This Change Was Made

Reuse the existing translation client, model/provider environment, glossary prompt, batching, retries, and authenticated CI commit/rebase loop for the complete 20-locale native matrix. The workflow refreshes deterministic translation-memory artifacts under `apps/.i18n/native` whenever Android or Apple source changes, and correctly commits first-run untracked artifacts.

The inventory now covers Android UI, permission, discovery, and resource strings plus iOS, macOS, and shared OpenClawKit UI sources. It excludes tests/generated paths, build substitutions, persistence/config identifiers, JSON payloads, and other machine literals while preserving interpolation and source spacing. Shipped runtime resources are wired in the Android and Apple PRs in this stack.

## User Impact

Native source inventory changes are translated through the same CI pipeline used by Control UI for Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Brazilian Portuguese, German, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, French, Hindi, Arabic, Italian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Indonesian, Polish, Thai, Vietnamese, Dutch, Persian, and Russian.

## Evidence

- `node --import tsx scripts/native-app-i18n.ts check` (`2,177` translatable entries)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/native-app-i18n.test.ts`
- Workflow matrix review: 20 locales, `max-parallel: 2`, authenticated commit/rebase retry loop
- `git diff --check`
- Final autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

This PR is stacked on #97110 and keeps the same provider/glossary/retry process for every native locale.
target.author: vincentkoc
